noteEn: Taken within 6 months before application. Front-facing, no hat, plain background, clearly visible. Write applicant's name on the back and attach to the application form. Applicants under age 1 are exempt (rule changed as of June 14, 2026 for new residence cards).
noteJa: 申請前6か月以内に正面から撮影された無帽、無背景、鮮明なもの。裏面に氏名を記載して申請書に貼付。1歳未満の方は不要。
